LightningComponentBundle.description: Dynamic welfare assessment entry screen component for Love 4 Animals assessment workflows.

property.name: episodeId
property.label: Episode Id
property.description: Optional episode Id supplied by the launching flow.

property.name: templateId
property.label: Template Id
property.description: Optional template Id supplied by the launching flow.

property.name: assessmentContext
property.label: Assessment Context
property.description: Assessment context to default when the screen loads.

property.name: payloadJson
property.label: Assessment Payload JSON
property.description: Structured JSON payload returned to the flow for persistence.
